visual_description: A medium close-up shot captures a young man and a young woman standing face-to-face in a dimly lit, dark environment. The man, on the left, has shaggy brown hair and is seen in profile, looking at the woman. The woman, on the right, has wavy brown hair and looks back at him with an intense expression. Both are dressed in dark, hooded clothing. The background is a blur of dark, indistinct shapes, suggesting a forest at night. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains steady, focusing on the intimate and serious moment between the two characters. The audio features a soft, melancholic instrumental melody playing in the background, creating a somber and intimate atmosphere. A young woman speaks in a low, slightly breathless voice, her tone filled with a mix of relief and vulnerability as she says, "I'm so glad you're here." Following her words, a young man lets out a short, soft, and relieved laugh, sounding genuinely happy and relieved. The scene cuts to a close-up of a pale, gaunt man with long, dark hair and a menacing expression. He is wearing a dark, high-collared garment
